sizing_rule.note: Position size derived from optimal f calculation based on system mathematical expectation (ME). Only applicable when ME > 0. Author emphasizes minimizing parameters to preserve positive expectation and degrees of freedom. Specific optimal f percentage not provided in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Position sizing must be based on mathematical expectation of the trading system; systems with positive mathematical expectation can be sized according to optimal f, while maintaining high degrees of freedom by minimizing parameters and rules to preserve positive expectation in future trading.
